TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fuxing Nsgan Fuxing o gaga Nsgan Taoyuan, kmpraan kana dxgal o 336.75 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 195.32 km², dxgal pmblxan o 120.65 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 10,692, sapah o 3,655, seejiq tnpusu 6,817 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 64%(Embgala). Embgala ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Fuxing o niqan 10 alang ni maxal 58. 58 o, Pyasan(比雅山 部落), Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu'(下宇內 部落), Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan , Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: *uxiŋ nsgan *uxiŋ o gaga nsgan taojuan, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o **,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(əmbgala). əmbgala ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan *uxiŋ o niqan ** alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, pjasan(*** **), ɾaħaw(takan) , wsiluŋ , ħbun , ħbun-sinqumi , kinjawpan , ɾaŋaj , kawbu' , kħpan , ɾaga' , ɾaħu'(*** **), qapu' , qus , jubaŋ , tɾiqan , *iħiŋ , kaju-baliq , k*jaj , tuba , luħuŋ , blħuj , blħuj , bilus , qojaw , qojaw , siloŋ , qojaw , sna*i , kin'lwan , sqij , ʦjasi , juwħbun ɾaka , kajwaj , qus , qmoʦjan , babau , qnau , ksunu' , qəħuj , kuli , sbunaw , quɾi , uɾuw , tkasan , ɾaka , pijawaj , tgləq , saɾuʦ , twan nokan , *iħiŋ , qɾaħu , tqwij , ŋuɾus , qpħaj , baluŋ , 'bu baluŋ , qaɾa , qu*i . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Fuxing Nsgan Fuxing o gaga Nsgan Taoyuan, kmpraan kana dxgal o 336.75 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 195.32 km², dxgal pmblxan o 120.65 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 10,692, sapah o 3,655, seejiq tnpusu 6,817 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 64%(Embgala). Embgala ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Fuxing o niqan 10 alang ni maxal 58. 58 o, Pyasan(比雅山 部落), Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu'(下宇內 部落), Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan , Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: *uxiŋ nsgan *uxiŋ o gaga nsgan taojuan, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o **,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(əmbgala). əmbgala ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan *uxiŋ o niqan ** alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, pjasan(*** **), ɾaħaw(takan) , wsiluŋ , ħbun , ħbun-sinqumi , kinjawpan , ɾaŋaj , kawbu' , kħpan , ɾaga' , ɾaħu'(*** **), qapu' , qus , jubaŋ , tɾiqan , *iħiŋ , kaju-baliq , k*jaj , tuba , luħuŋ , blħuj , blħuj , bilus , qojaw , qojaw , siloŋ , qojaw , sna*i , kin'lwan , sqij , ʦjasi , juwħbun ɾaka , kajwaj , qus , qmoʦjan , babau , qnau , ksunu' , qəħuj , kuli , sbunaw , quɾi , uɾuw , tkasan , ɾaka , pijawaj , tgləq , saɾuʦ , twan nokan , *iħiŋ , qɾaħu , tqwij , ŋuɾus , qpħaj , baluŋ , 'bu baluŋ , qaɾa , qu*i . pusupnjaħan patas
